## Problem / Motivation

What are you trying to do? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the command, app, or behavior you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to similar tools, links, etc.
